personal.name: Halimoh Olatunji
personal.title: Data Analyst | Analytical Problem Solver
personal.subtitle: Ready to Make an Impact.
personal.about_p1: My name is Halimoh Olatunji, an aspiring Data Analyst with a strong desire to learn, grow, and bring dedication to the field. I embarked on this journey to transform raw data into actionable insights, helping organizations make smart decisions about the future.
personal.about_p2: Through rigorous studies and practical project experience, I have built a strong foundation in modern data analysis tools. I am continuously participating in training and virtual experiences to sharpen my critical thinking and problem-solving skills.

projects.title: Customer Mall Segmentation & Clustering
projects.description: Identifying vital customer groups for targeted marketing. Utilized data analysis and machine learning clustering on demographics and spending behavior.

projects.title: NYPD Arrest Data 2022
projects.description: An exploratory study recognizing patterns and trends in NYC police enforcement activity, examining crime types, dates, locations, and demographics.

projects.title: Supermarket Sales Dashboard
projects.description: A comprehensive Power BI dashboard providing insights into key metrics like revenue, profit margins, and customer types via interactive visuals.

achievements.title: Microsoft Certified: Power Platform Fundamentals
achievements.description: Successfully passed the PL-900 certification, demonstrating expertise in using the Power Platform for low-code solutions, business processes, and data analysis.

achievements.title: Advanced Data Analytics
achievements.issuer: Bayan Academy supported by J.P. Morgan
achievements.description: Completed a rigorous 15-day advanced program covering SQL, Orange Data mining, and publishing a comprehensive research paper on index crimes.

achievements.title: Google Data Analytics Certificate
achievements.description: Mastered a wide range of data analytics topics including data visualization, statistical analysis, and spreadsheet management, culminating in a capstone project.

achievements.title: Power BI in Data Analytics Case Experience
achievements.description: Improved data cleaning and visualization techniques, producing extensive dashboards for call center trends, churn analysis, and diversity & inclusion.
